Q-Q Plot Type

Source: R/type_more.R
type_qq.Rd

Creates quantile-quantile plots to assess normality or compare two distributions.

Usage

type_qq(
  distribution = stats::qnorm,
  dparams = list(),
  point_size = 2,
  point_alpha = 0.6,
  show_line = TRUE,
  line_color = "#E64B35"
)

Arguments

distribution

Target distribution function (e.g., stats::qnorm)

dparams

List of distribution parameters

point_size

Point size

point_alpha

Point transparency

show_line

Add reference line (default TRUE)

line_color

Color for reference line

Value

A cliplot_type object
